auth.verify_email.subject: Verify your StellarStack account
auth.verify_email.body:
Hi {name},

Click the link below to verify your StellarStack account:

{url}

This link expires in {expiresMinutes} minutes.
auth.password_reset.subject: Reset your StellarStack password
auth.password_reset.body:
Hi {name},

We received a request to reset your StellarStack password. Click the link below to choose a new one:

{url}

If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.
subuser.invited.subject: You've been invited to manage a server on StellarStack
